title: Storage alias resource is unavailable Error 403
excerpt:
I have several users who occasionally upload .docx files that keep getting flagged by monday.com and automatically removed. This isn’t happening for all users and all documents. 
  
Anyone have a clue what could be happe…

posts.author: sgharibian (Sarkis Gharibian)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have several users who occasionally upload .docx files that keep getting flagged by monday.com and automatically removed. This isn’t happening for all users and all documents.

image1230×106 7.9 KB

Anyone have a clue what could be happening or experiencing something similar?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @sgharibian,

Sorry you’re running into this error message! I investigated internally and it seems this might be a bug in the system for specific users. Would you be happy to reach out to support@monday.com with this information, and they can pass you over to our technical support team?
